title: T-060 — UI: TEC-085 factory_specs Review modal + TEC-086 Factory Specs List
prompt:
# T-060 — UI: TEC-085 factory_specs Review modal + TEC-086 Factory Specs List

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §7.4, §10A TEC-085, §10A TEC-086
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:460-483` (spec_review_modal); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:74-108` (specs_screen)

## Goal
Cross-item factory_specs/specifications list + Technical review modal for approve-for-factory sign-off.

UI reads/writes Technical-owned factory_specs/internal_product_spec records. Do not use generic reference_tables.specifications as the backing store. Show shared release status, paired BOM status, RM usability blockers, clone-on-write warning for released edits, and read-only Quality lab status when present.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/factory-specs/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/factory-specs/_components/review-modal.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-085-086-factory-specs.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Creating generic reference_tables.specifications storage
- FactorySpec+BOM approval API internals (T-080)
- Release adapter internals (T-081)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list and modal render, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:460-483 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:74-108, then list columns and modal field set match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given a Technical approver clicks Approve for factory, when API returns 200, then modal closes, shared release status changes to approved_for_factory/released, and audit evidence is visible.
3. Given user lacks technical.spec.approve or technical.factory_spec.approve, when on page, then approve/sign-off actions are disabled with a Technical permission explanation.
4. Given RM usability or release blockers exist, when modal opens, then approve is disabled and each blocker code/remediation from validateRmUsability/shared release guard is shown.
5. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
6. Given list queries run, then the backing domain is Technical `factory_specs`/`internal_product_spec`, not generic `reference_tables.specifications`.
7. Given factory_spec has paired BOM pending approval, UI links to T-090 bundle panel and never claims NPD G4 alone unlocks factory use.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + RBAC + signoff flow.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-085-086-specs.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass audit on signoff.
- Do not label the approver as Quality Lead; Technical owns factory_spec approval.
- Do not hide release blockers behind generic validation errors.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:460-483` (spec_review_modal) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:74-108` (specs_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
